components.name: button
components.purpose: Interactive element that triggers actions

anatomy.description: Button container with optional icons and label text. Icon sizing scales with size variant.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full width in stacked layouts, touch target minimum 44px x 44px
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Inline, size as specified

interactionRules: Never use CSS border for outlined variant. Use box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px.
Radius scales with size (xs=radius-xs through xl=radius-xl).
No hardcoded colors. All colors via var(--token).

mobileTouchAlternatives.hover: Active state persists on tap until other element focused
mobileTouchAlternatives.tooltip: Bottom sheet tooltip on long press (600ms+)

aiHints.whenToUse: Primary actions, form submissions, confirmations, call-to-action
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Navigation (use links), toggling state (use Toggle), view switching (use Tabs)
aiHints.generationNotes: Default to filled/primary/md. Use danger for destructive actions. Use ghost for tertiary actions. Use loading state during async operations.

components.name: icon-button
components.purpose: Square interactive element with icon only, no label text

anatomy.description: Square button container with centered icon. No label text allowed.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Touch target 44px x 44px minimum
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Size as specified, hover state visible

interactionRules: aria-label is mandatory - no unlabeled icon buttons
Radius scales with size
No CSS border for outlined. Use box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px.

aiHints.whenToUse: Close dialogs, secondary actions, density-constrained layouts, toggle states
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Primary actions (use Button), form labels, navigation
aiHints.generationNotes: Always include aria-label. Default to tonal emphasis for secondary actions. Use toggle variant for binary states.

components.name: badge
components.purpose: Small status indicator, typically overlaid on other elements

anatomy.description: Pill-shaped container, anchored to parent element. Content is number, dot, or icon.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Smaller badges on compact layouts
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard sizing

interactionRules: Badge always uses --radius-full (pill shape). No size-based radius scaling.
Never use Badge standalone without a parent element to anchor to.
Badge is positioned absolute/overlay, not in content flow.

aiHints.whenToUse: Notification counts, status indicators, unread counts, inventory status
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Detailed status messages (use Alert), persistent notifications (use Toast)
aiHints.generationNotes: Use role colors for semantic meaning (danger=errors, success=complete). Dot type for simple indicator, count for numbers, max for 99+ overflow.

components.name: chip
components.purpose: Compact element for filters, tags, or selections

anatomy.description: Compact rectangular container with optional icons. Trailing icon is typically remove button (X).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Stack vertically in constrained space, wrap behavior
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Inline flow, wrap to next line if needed

interactionRules: Same inset box-shadow rule for outlined variant. No CSS border.
Radius scales with size (sm=radius-xs through lg=radius-md).
Must have .hover and .disabled class selectors alongside pseudo-classes.

aiHints.whenToUse: Filtering, tag display, filter badges, selection indicators
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Standalone actions (use Button), simple status (use Badge)
aiHints.generationNotes: Use tonal for filters, outlined for tags. Include remove icon for dismissible chips. Ensure keyboard support for accessibility.

components.name: toggle
components.purpose: Binary switch for on/off states

anatomy.description: Track with sliding thumb. Optional label text adjacent to toggle.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Touch target 44px height minimum
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard sizing

interactionRules: Toggle always uses --radius-full. No size-based radius scaling.
Never hardcode white for thumb. Use var(--surface-default).
Thumb must slide, not jump. Smooth animation required.

aiHints.whenToUse: Binary settings (on/off, enabled/disabled), feature toggles
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Multi-state selections (use Radio), checkboxes (use Checkbox)
aiHints.generationNotes: Default to off state. Use aria-checked for accessibility. Ensure smooth animation on state change.

components.name: avatar
components.purpose: Visual representation of a user or entity

anatomy.description: Circular container with image, text initials, or icon fallback. Optional status dot in corner.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Scale down to fit compact layouts
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard sizing

interactionRules: Status dot must use outer wrapper (not inside overflow:hidden avatar).
Status dot position uses inset-inline-end not right (RTL support).
Never hardcode white for status dot border. Use var(--surface-default).

aiHints.whenToUse: User profiles, author identification, team lists, chat interfaces
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Generic icons (use Icon), decorative images
aiHints.generationNotes: Default to image type with fallback to initials. Use status dot for online/away indicators. Ensure aria-label for accessibility.

components.name: divider
components.purpose: Visual separator between content sections

anatomy.description: Horizontal or vertical line, optionally with centered label text

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width horizontal divider
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Full-width or custom width

interactionRules: Never use Divider as a decorative border on a component.
Divider is a standalone content separator.

aiHints.whenToUse: Separating sections, visual hierarchy, content grouping
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Component borders (use Card/Panel), decorative elements
aiHints.generationNotes: Use default weight for subtle separation, strong for emphasis. Optional label for context.

components.name: card
components.purpose: Container for grouped content with multiple layout slots

anatomy.description: Rectangular container extending ds-surface with optional header, content, footer. Media is flush-edge image at top.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full width with default padding, stack vertically
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Width controlled by parent layout, horizontal arrangement possible

interactionRules: Never set width/height on the card. Parent layout controls dimensions.
Never use size (sm/md/lg). Use density (compact/default/comfortable).
Never use CSS border for outlined. Use box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px.
Never use status colors on card surface. Cards are neutral containers.

mobileTouchAlternatives.hover: Active state on tap for interactive cards

aiHints.whenToUse: Content containers, data presentation, grouped information, product/profile cards
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Modal dialogs (use Dialog), floating messages (use Toast/Snackbar)
aiHints.generationNotes: Default to elevated/default. Use interactive variant for clickable cards with state layer. Slot content semantic to layout (media first, footer last).

components.name: panel
components.purpose: Persistent content region. Side panel on desktop, bottom sheet on mobile.

anatomy.description: Resizable/collapsible panel extending ds-surface. Responsive: side panel (desktop) or bottom sheet (mobile).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Bottom sheet with drag handle, 3 snap points (25%, 50%, 90%), safe-area-inset-bottom
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Side panel (persistent or collapsible), optional resize handle

interactionRules: Never build a separate Sheet component. Panel IS the sheet on mobile.
Never set fixed width. Parent layout controls width on desktop.
Mobile sheet must respect safe-area-inset-bottom.
Focus must be trapped inside panel when open.

mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe down to dismiss bottom sheet

aiHints.whenToUse: Navigation sidebars, content filters, detailed views, split-view layouts
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Modal dialogs (use Dialog), small tooltips (use Tooltip)
aiHints.generationNotes: Auto-adapt to desktop (side panel) or mobile (bottom sheet). Include close button in dismissible panels.

components.name: dialog
components.purpose: Modal overlay requiring user action before continuing

anatomy.description: Modal dialog with backdrop overlay. Always elevated surface with shadow.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Centered modal (compact), bottom sheet (large/form), full-screen for forms
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Centered modal, max-width 560px, fixed positioning

accessibility.focusIndicator: Focus trap, initial focus on first focusable

motionBehavior.enter: Fade backdrop + scale dialog with --motion-normal and --ease-decelerate
motionBehavior.exit: Fade out backdrop + dialog with --motion-fast and --ease-accelerate

interactionRules: Never allow interaction with content behind dialog while open.
Focus must be trapped inside dialog.
ESC key must close dismissible dialogs.
Backdrop click must close dismissible dialogs (optional, can be disabled).

mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe down on mobile bottom sheet dialogs to dismiss

aiHints.whenToUse: Confirmations, alerts, form submission, user decisions
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Inline messages (use Alert), persistent sidebars (use Panel)
aiHints.generationNotes: Type: alert=informational, confirmation=destructive action, form=input collection. Primary action button aligned right.

components.name: alert
components.purpose: Inline status message within content flow

anatomy.description: Inline status container extending ds-surface with role-specific color. Icon, title, description, and action button are optional.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full width, stack actions vertically if needed
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Full width, actions inline

requiredAria: aria-live (polite for non-urgent, assertive for urgent)

interactionRules: Never use Alert for floating/positioned messages. Use Snackbar or Toast.
Never use primary role for alerts. Primary is for brand actions, not status.
Alert is always inline. Never position: fixed/absolute.
Never use CSS border for outlined. Use box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px.

aiHints.whenToUse: Status messages, validation feedback, important notices, in-page warnings
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Floating notifications (use Toast/Snackbar), background information (use Card)
aiHints.generationNotes: Use role color for semantic meaning. Tonal for warnings, filled for errors. Include dismiss button for optional closure.

components.name: snackbar
components.purpose: Brief floating message with optional action. Auto-dismisses.

anatomy.description: Single-line floating message with optional action button. Auto-dismisses after timeout.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width bottom, safe-area-inset-bottom
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Fixed bottom-start, max-width 400px

accessibility.focusIndicator: Focus on action button if present

interactionRules: Never use for persistent messages. Use Alert (inline) or Toast (stacking).
Max 1 snackbar visible at a time. New snackbar replaces current.
Never use primary or ai roles. Snackbar is for status feedback.
Auto-dismiss: 5s for info/success, persistent for danger.

aiHints.whenToUse: Feedback messages, brief status updates, undo actions
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Multiple simultaneous notifications (use Toast), persistent errors (use Alert)
aiHints.generationNotes: Single snackbar queue - new message replaces existing. Use danger for errors (persistent), success for confirmations (5s timeout).

components.name: toast
components.purpose: Floating notification with stacking. More persistent than Snackbar.

anatomy.description: Elevated card with 4px leading accent strip in role color. Supports title, description, action button, and close.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width bottom, stacks vertically, swipe-to-dismiss, safe-area-inset-bottom
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Fixed bottom-end, max-width 380px, stacks vertically

motionBehavior.stack: Stagger enter animations by 100ms per toast

interactionRules: Never use role color for entire toast background. Only the accent strip is colored.
Toast surface is always neutral (elevated). Distinguish from Snackbar which IS role-colored.
Max 3 toasts visible. Queue additional notifications.
Default auto-dismiss: 5s (info/success), persistent (danger).

mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe left/right to dismiss individual toast

aiHints.whenToUse: Stacked notifications, multi-step feedback, persistent notifications, error logs
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Single brief message (use Snackbar), inline feedback (use Alert)
aiHints.generationNotes: Use accent strip for semantic role color (danger/warning/success). Surface neutral. Max 3 visible, queue rest.

components.name: tooltip
components.purpose: Informational popup triggered by hover or focus

anatomy.description: Small floating container with arrow pointing to anchor element. Inverted surface (dark on light, light on dark).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Tap-to-reveal, long-press (600ms+) for rich tooltip
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Hover/focus triggered, mouse movement away dismisses

interactionRules: Never use for critical information. Tooltips are supplementary.
Touch target of trigger must be 44x44px minimum.
Position auto-adjusts to avoid viewport overflow.

mobileTouchAlternatives.longPress: Long press (600ms) reveals rich tooltip on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Supplementary help text, keyboard shortcuts, abbreviation explanations
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Critical information, complex content (use Popover)
aiHints.generationNotes: Plain type for text only, rich for title+description+action. Position auto-adjusts. Desktop: hover/focus triggered.

components.name: popover
components.purpose: Anchored floating container for rich content

anatomy.description: Floating elevated container anchored to trigger element. Flexible content area.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-screen overlay or bottom sheet depending on content size
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Floating anchored container, auto-positioned to avoid overflow

accessibility.focusIndicator: Focus visible on elements inside popover

motionBehavior.open: Fade + scale from trigger with --motion-fast and --ease-decelerate

interactionRules: Never use Popover for simple text. Use Tooltip.
Never use Popover for action lists. Use Menu.
Must dismiss on outside click.
Focus trap optional (can be non-modal).

mobileTouchAlternatives.fullScreen: Full-screen overlay on mobile for complex content

aiHints.whenToUse: Rich content display, complex forms, inline editors, multi-part interactions
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Simple text (use Tooltip), action lists (use Menu), modal dialogs (use Dialog)
aiHints.generationNotes: Auto-positions to avoid viewport overflow. Dismiss on click-outside. Can contain any complex content.

components.name: menu
components.purpose: Anchored dropdown list of actions or selections

anatomy.description: Floating list of menu items with optional icons, shortcuts, checkmarks. Supports nesting (desktop only).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-screen selector for long lists (20+), bottom sheet for short lists
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Floating anchored dropdown, keyboard navigable (arrow keys + enter)

accessibility.focusIndicator: Focus visible on active menu item

interactionRules: Never nest more than 2 levels of submenus.
Keyboard navigation required: arrow keys, enter, escape.
Selected item must show checkmark or highlight.
Mobile: use bottom sheet or full-screen selector, not floating dropdown.

mobileTouchAlternatives.longPress: Long-press triggers context menu on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Dropdown actions, context menus, selection dropdowns, primary navigation
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Rich content (use Popover), simple links (use navigation)
aiHints.generationNotes: Default trigger: click. Support keyboard navigation. Selected items show checkmark. Mobile: bottom sheet/full-screen, not floating.

components.name: text-field
components.purpose: Single-line or multi-line text input

anatomy.description: Text input container with optional label above, supporting icons, helper text, error state, and character counter.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width, larger touch target
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Width controlled by parent, standard sizing

motionBehavior.focus: Border color transition + label animation with --motion-fast

interactionRules: Never use CSS border for outlined variant. Use box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px.
Label must be above the input, never inline/floating.
Error message replaces helper text, never shown simultaneously.
Character counter is optional and positioned below input.

mobileTouchAlternatives.keyboard: Native mobile keyboard respect input type (email, password, etc.)

aiHints.whenToUse: Text input, search fields, password entry, multi-line content
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Simple selects (use Selection Controls), date selection (use Date Picker)
aiHints.generationNotes: Default: outlined/md. Type: text, password (with visibility toggle), search (with clear). Label required for accessibility.

components.name: selection-controls
components.purpose: Checkbox, Radio, and Switch for boolean/choice selections

anatomy.description: Three control types: Checkbox (multi-select), Radio (single-select in group), Switch (binary state). Optional label adjacent.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Touch target 44x44px minimum
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard sizing

interactionRules: Touch target 44x44px minimum even if visual element is smaller.
Checkbox/Radio must have visible focus ring.
Never use Switch for selections with more than 2 states.
Radio must be in a group (2+ options).
Checkbox supports indeterminate state (mixed selection in group).

aiHints.whenToUse: Form selections, preferences, consent, multi-select options, binary toggles
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Many independent toggles (use Toggle components), select dropdowns (use Menu)
aiHints.generationNotes: Checkbox for multi-select, Radio for single-select in group, Switch for binary form context. Always include label or aria-label.

components.name: slider
components.purpose: Continuous or discrete value selection along a track

anatomy.description: Horizontal track with draggable thumb. Optional value tooltip above thumb. Support for range (two thumbs).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Larger touch target for thumb
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard sizing

interactionRules: Touch target for thumb: 44x44px minimum.
Range slider thumbs must not cross each other.
Discrete slider shows step marks on track.
Value label tooltip updates during drag.

mobileTouchAlternatives.touch: Touch and drag to adjust value

aiHints.whenToUse: Value ranges, volume/brightness control, filtering by range
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Precise input (use Text Field), many discrete options (use Select)
aiHints.generationNotes: Continuous for smooth ranges, discrete for steps, range for start/end. Include label tooltip for clarity.

components.name: date-picker
components.purpose: Calendar-based date or date range selection

anatomy.description: Text field trigger with calendar popover. Support for single date, date range, and relative shortcuts.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Bottom sheet calendar or native date input
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Popover calendar grid below text field

interactionRules: Never use inline calendar without a text field trigger.
Date format must respect locale.
Range picker shows highlight on dates between start/end.
Month/year navigation for jumping forward/backward.

mobileTouchAlternatives.native: Native date picker input on mobile when appropriate

aiHints.whenToUse: Date selection, date ranges, reporting periods, event dates
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Simple text dates (use Text Field), time selection (separate component)
aiHints.generationNotes: Type: singleDate (one date), dateRange (start+end with highlight), relative (presets like 'Last 7 days'). Locale-aware formatting.

components.name: tag-input
components.purpose: Multi-value input with tag chips and autocomplete

anatomy.description: Text field with tag chips displayed inline. Suggestions dropdown for autocomplete.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width, stack chips vertically if many
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Chips wrap inline with input field

interactionRules: Never allow duplicate tags.
Backspace on empty input removes last tag.
Autocomplete suggestions filter as user types.
Comma or Enter can trigger tag addition (configurable).
Max tags display '+N more' if overflow.

mobileTouchAlternatives.tap: Tap to add tag from suggestions

aiHints.whenToUse: Multiple email/tag input, filtering with selections, comma-separated values
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Single selection (use Text Field or Menu), pre-defined lists only (use Checkbox list)
aiHints.generationNotes: Support autocomplete for efficiency. Prevent duplicates. Allow backspace to remove. Show +N more for overflow.

components.name: file-upload
components.purpose: Drag-and-drop zone with file list management

anatomy.description: Drag-and-drop area with optional file preview. File list shows name, size, progress, and remove button.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width drag zone, stacked file list
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Horizontal drag zone with file list below

interactionRules: Always provide a 'Browse' button fallback alongside drag-and-drop.
File size/type validation must show inline error per file.
Dashed border (idle), solid border (drag-over), filled (uploading).
Progress bar shows percentage or indefinite while uploading.
Uploaded files show checkmark and remove button.

mobileTouchAlternatives.browse: Tap browse button for file picker on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: File uploads, document attachment, image uploads, multi-file selection
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Single file selection in form (use input type=file), file management (use File Browser)
aiHints.generationNotes: Drag-and-drop + browse button required. Show progress during upload. Validate file type/size inline. Show checkmark on completion.

components.name: tabs
components.purpose: Horizontal navigation between content sections

anatomy.description: Horizontal tab bar with optional icon and badge. Active indicator is bottom border.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Scrollable with overflow indicator, partial tab visibility
responsiveBehavior.desktop: All tabs visible inline, no scroll

motionBehavior.indicatorMove: Bottom border indicator slides to new tab with --motion-normal

interactionRules: Tabs are fixed-height atoms. Use size (sm/md/lg) not density.
Active indicator is a bottom border (::after), not a background fill.
Icon is optional but must scale with size.
Badge shows count or notification status.

mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe left/right to switch tabs on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Section navigation, content switching, filter views, dashboard tabs
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Primary navigation (use Nav Rail/Bottom Nav), many items (use Menu)
aiHints.generationNotes: Default: md size. Fixed-height, not density-based. Active indicator is bottom border, not background.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.purpose: Navigation trail showing page hierarchy with overflow collapse

anatomy.description: Sequential breadcrumb items with chevron separators. Ellipsis button collapses middle items into popover.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Back-arrow + current page label only (no full trail)
responsiveBehavior.desktop: First + last 2 items + ellipsis for middle (max 4 visible)

interactionRules: Collapse threshold: 4 visible items max. Collapse middle items.
Always show: first (root) + last 2 (parent + current).
Ellipsis button opens popover listing collapsed items.
Label truncation: max-width 160px, ellipsis, title attribute tooltip.
Mobile: back-arrow + current only, no trail.

aiHints.whenToUse: Deep navigation hierarchies, showing current location, breadcrumb trails
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Shallow structures (2-3 levels), primary navigation
aiHints.generationNotes: Auto-collapses at 4+ items. Ellipsis opens popover. Desktop shows trail, mobile shows back + current.

components.name: nav-rail
components.purpose: Collapsible side navigation for desktop

anatomy.description: Vertical navigation rail with icon + label (expanded) or icon only (collapsed). Badge count on items.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Never show. Replaced by Bottom Nav on mobile.
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Side rail, responsive collapse/expand

interactionRules: Does NOT extend ds-surface. Standalone component.
Never show on mobile. Use Bottom Nav instead.
Active item highlight, optional badge count.
Collapse/expand toggle button in header.

aiHints.whenToUse: Desktop application navigation, sidebar menu, main navigation
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Mobile (use Bottom Nav), header navigation (use Tabs)
aiHints.generationNotes: Desktop only. Expand/collapse toggle. Active item highlight. Optional badges for counts.

components.name: bottom-nav
components.purpose: Mobile navigation bar with icon + label

anatomy.description: Fixed bottom bar with icon + label. 4-5 items max. Badge count on items.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Fixed bottom, full-width, safe-area-inset-bottom
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Never show. Replaced by Nav Rail on desktop.

interactionRules: Does NOT extend ds-surface. Standalone fixed-bottom bar.
Never show on desktop. Use Nav Rail instead.
Max 5 items. More items require a 'more' menu.
Fixed bottom position respects safe-area-inset-bottom.
Icon + label visible on all items.

aiHints.whenToUse: Mobile app primary navigation, mobile menu
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Desktop (use Nav Rail), header navigation (use Tabs)
aiHints.generationNotes: Mobile only. Fixed bottom. 4-5 items max. Active item highlighted. Optional badges.

components.name: pagination
components.purpose: Page navigation for paginated content

anatomy.description: Navigation controls with prev/next buttons and numbered page indicators. Optional rows-per-page selector.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Compact prev/next + 'Page X of Y' indicator
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Full numbered pages with ellipsis for many pages

interactionRules: Never show all pages when total exceeds 7. Use ellipsis truncation.
Prev/next buttons disabled on first/last page.
Ellipsis button opens menu to jump to hidden pages.
Current page highlighted distinctly.

mobileTouchAlternatives.tap: Tap prev/next or page number to navigate

aiHints.whenToUse: Large data lists, search results, tabular data navigation
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Infinite scroll layouts, single page results
aiHints.generationNotes: Type: numbered (pages 1-N), compact (prev/next + 'Page X of Y'). Ellipsis at 7+ pages.

components.name: stepper
components.purpose: Multi-step progress indicator with navigation

anatomy.description: Numbered steps with progress indicator, connecting lines (desktop), and content area. Supports horizontal (desktop) and vertical (mobile).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Vertical stepper, stacked steps
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Horizontal stepper with connecting lines

interactionRules: Never skip steps. Steps must be completed in order unless marked optional.
Completed steps show checkmark, active shows filled circle, upcoming shows outline.
Error state shows danger color on circle.
Connecting lines on desktop, omitted on mobile.

mobileTouchAlternatives.tap: Tap to navigate to step (if allowed)

aiHints.whenToUse: Multi-step forms, onboarding flows, setup wizards, complex workflows
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Linear single-page forms, simple navigation
aiHints.generationNotes: Horizontal desktop, vertical mobile. Completed=checkmark, Active=filled, Upcoming=outline. Error state in danger color.

components.name: list
components.purpose: Structured vertical collection of related items

anatomy.description: Vertical list of items with optional leading/trailing elements and multi-line text.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width, swipe actions for dismiss/archive, minimum 48px touch target
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard list, hover actions visible on row hover

interactionRules: Never nest lists more than one level deep. Use Tree View for hierarchical.
List items must have minimum 48px touch target on mobile.
Selection: none (view-only), single (radio behavior), multi (checkbox behavior).
Dividers: full-width, inset (past leading element), or none.
Mobile swipe actions for common operations (archive, delete).

mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe left/right for contextual actions on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Data collections, contact lists, message threads, item listings
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Hierarchical data (use Tree View), tabular data (use Data Grid)
aiHints.generationNotes: Type: simple (text), twoLine (primary+secondary), threeLine (primary+secondary+tertiary), rich (avatar+text+action). Support dividers and selection.

components.name: accordion
components.purpose: Expandable/collapsible content sections

anatomy.description: Stack of expandable panels. Header includes icon, label, optional badge. Content area with nested content.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-width, stacked vertically
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard accordion layout

motionBehavior.expand: Height auto-animate with --motion-normal and --ease-standard, chevron rotate

interactionRules: Never auto-collapse other panels in multi-expand mode.
Chevron rotates 90deg (LTR) or -90deg (RTL) in sync with expand.
Accordion headers must be keyboard navigable (arrow keys, Enter/Space).
Height animation prevents layout shift.

aiHints.whenToUse: FAQ sections, expandable details, grouped collapsible content, form sections
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Always-visible content, simple expanding text (use native details element)
aiHints.generationNotes: Type: singleExpand (one open at a time), multiExpand (multiple open). Chevron icon rotates on expand. Keyboard support required.

components.name: data-grid
components.purpose: Enterprise data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and row actions

anatomy.description: Table-like structure with sticky header/columns, sortable/filterable columns, expandable rows, row selection, and overflow menu.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Card-based layout per row OR horizontal scroll with column priority (hide low-priority)
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Full table with sticky columns and header, horizontal scroll for overflow

interactionRules: Never load all data at once. Always paginate or virtualize rows beyond 100.
Column resize must not shrink below minimum content width.
Sort indicators must be visible and use aria-sort attribute.
Sticky first column and header for long tables.
Expandable rows show nested detail panel below row.

mobileTouchAlternatives.cardLayout: Card-based layout showing one row per card on mobile
mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe right for row actions on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Large data collections, analytics dashboards, admin tables, data-driven UIs
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Simple lists (use List), side-by-side comparisons (use Cards)
aiHints.generationNotes: Virtualize/paginate for 100+ rows. Support sorting, filtering, resizing. Sticky columns. Mobile: card layout. Selection: none/single/multi.

components.name: tree-view
components.purpose: Hierarchical data display with expandable nodes

anatomy.description: Hierarchical tree with expandable nodes, indent guides, optional icons/badges, selection/navigation modes.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Reduced indent, drill-down navigation for 4+ nesting levels
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard tree with indent guides, deep nesting allowed

motionBehavior.nodeExpand: Children slide-in with --motion-fast, indent guides draw progressively

interactionRules: Never render more than 4 nesting levels on mobile. Switch to drill-down navigation.
Parent checkbox reflects tri-state (all/some/none children selected).
Lazy-load children for nodes with 50+ descendants.
Expand/collapse icons rotate on state change.
Navigation tree: single-select, selection tree: checkboxes.

mobileTouchAlternatives.drillDown: Breadcrumb drill-down for deep nesting on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Hierarchical data, file systems, organizational charts, category trees
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Flat data (use List), tabular data (use Data Grid)
aiHints.generationNotes: Navigation: single-select, selection: multi-select with tri-state. Drill-down on mobile for 4+ levels. Lazy-load deep nodes.

components.name: timeline
components.purpose: Chronological event sequence display

anatomy.description: Vertical or horizontal sequence of events with nodes (icon/avatar/dot), connecting line, and event details.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Always vertical, always left-aligned. Horizontal collapses to vertical.
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Vertical or horizontal, alternating alignment available

motionBehavior.nodeAppear: Node animates in as scrolled into view

interactionRules: Never use horizontal timeline on mobile.
Connecting line must not break between nodes. Use continuous border.
Timestamps must respect locale formatting.
Node color reflects state: active (primary), completed (success), error (danger), warning (warning), upcoming (neutral).
Expandable detail sections below events.

aiHints.whenToUse: Event chronologies, project timelines, status progression, activity feeds
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Parallel events, process flow (use Stepper), simple lists
aiHints.generationNotes: Vertical primary orientation. Desktop: horizontal available. Mobile: vertical only. Node color by state. Continuous connector line.

components.name: loading
components.purpose: Progress and loading state indicators

anatomy.description: Four types: spinner (circular indeterminate), progress bar (linear determinate/indeterminate), skeleton (content placeholder), dots (typing indicator).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Inline spinner in content flow
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Standard sizing

motionBehavior.progressBar: Shimmer sweep left-to-right (RTL: right-to-left), indeterminate animation

interactionRules: Never show a loading spinner without an accessible label (aria-label or visually hidden text).
Skeleton must match the actual content layout it replaces.
Progress bar percentage must never go backwards.
Reduced motion: replace spin/pulse with static opacity change.
Full-screen overlay dims background (optional scrim).

aiHints.whenToUse: Data loading, operation progress, content placeholders, async operations
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Page-level navigation (use navigation loading state), disabled state (use disabled attribute)
aiHints.generationNotes: Type: spinner (indeterminate), progressBar (determinate), skeleton (placeholder), dots (typing). Require aria-label. Reduced motion: static opacity.

components.name: ai-chat
components.purpose: Conversational AI interface with message history, streaming responses, and rich content

anatomy.description: Chat interface with message list (user/assistant), input area, suggested actions, typing indicator, and rich content support (markdown, code, images).

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-screen, input pinned to bottom with keyboard-aware repositioning
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Panel or full-page with 600px max message width centered

interactionRules: Never auto-send on Enter without Shift+Enter for newline support.
Streaming responses must not cause layout shift in message list.
Message list must preserve scroll position when loading older messages (prepend, not shift).
Floating widget must not obscure critical page content.
Support rich content: markdown, code syntax highlighting, tables, images, attachments.

aiHints.whenToUse: AI assistant conversations, chatbots, support chat, interactive help
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Simple Q&A (use Accordion), notification inbox (use Notification Center)
aiHints.generationNotes: Support streaming text (character-by-character), typing indicator, message reactions. Markdown/code syntax highlight. User: right-align/primary tonal, Assistant: left-align/surface.

components.name: command-palette
components.purpose: Global search and action launcher overlay

anatomy.description: Overlay with search input, grouped results (pages, actions, recent, components), result items with shortcuts, navigation hints.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-screen overlay with bottom-anchored input
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Centered overlay, 640px max width, max 60vh height

accessibility.focusIndicator: Focus on search input, active result

motionBehavior.resultFilter: Instant, no animation on list changes

interactionRules: Never block the shortcut (Cmd+K/Ctrl+K) when a text field is focused. Use modifier key check.
Results must update within 100ms of keystroke (debounce at 150ms max).
Must be fully keyboard navigable. Mouse is optional.
Escape always closes, even from nested views.
Trigger shortcut (Cmd+K) auto-focuses search input.

aiHints.whenToUse: Global application search, action launcher, keyboard-driven navigation
aiHints.whenNotToUse: In-page search (use Search component), filtered lists (use Menu)
aiHints.generationNotes: Trigger: Cmd+K or Ctrl+K. Auto-focus input on open. Results grouped by category. Shortcuts visible. Keyboard navigable. Escape closes.

components.name: notification-center
components.purpose: Centralized notification inbox panel with categorization and actions

anatomy.description: Bell icon trigger with unread badge. Slide-in panel with filter tabs, notification items, actions, and footer link.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Full-screen bottom sheet with swipe-to-dismiss per notification
responsiveBehavior.desktop: 400px panel dropdown or slide-in from right edge

interactionRules: Never auto-dismiss notifications from the center. Only Toasts auto-dismiss.
Unread count badge must sync with actual unread state in real-time.
Notification actions must be reachable by keyboard.
Swipe-to-dismiss on mobile must have undo (Snackbar pattern).
Group notifications by: All, Unread, Mentions, System.

mobileTouchAlternatives.swipe: Swipe left/right per notification for dismiss/undo

aiHints.whenToUse: Notification management, inbox-style notification center, user alerts
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Brief status messages (use Toast), inline alerts (use Alert)
aiHints.generationNotes: Bell trigger with unread count badge. Filter tabs: All/Unread/Mentions/System. Grouping by date/source. Swipe-to-dismiss with undo.

components.name: search
components.purpose: Contextual search with filters, suggestions, and results display

anatomy.description: Search bar with clear button, suggestions dropdown, active filter chips, result list with highlighted matches.

responsiveBehavior.mobile: Expandable search bar (icon tap expands to full-width), full-screen results
responsiveBehavior.desktop: Search bar in header/toolbar, suggestions dropdown below, results in main content

interactionRules: Never submit search on every keystroke. Debounce at 300ms minimum.
Search must support Escape to clear and close suggestions.
Highlighted match text must use <mark> element, not just bold.
Empty results must always suggest corrective action.
Filter chips show active filters with remove button.
Voice input button optional (if supported).

mobileTouchAlternatives.tapIcon: Tap search icon to expand to full-width on mobile

aiHints.whenToUse: Site/app search, filtering data, finding content, autocomplete suggestions
aiHints.whenNotToUse: Simple selects (use Menu), column filtering (use Data Grid)
aiHints.generationNotes: Debounce input at 300ms+. Suggestions dropdown on focus. Results page with match highlighting. Filter chips for active filters. Escape to close.
